source.label: Didi's Korean Culture Podcast
source.note: Speaker labels are the recogniser's own, not ours: nobody is named in this window, so we do not know which voice is the host and a run that guessed would be inventing the one thing a viewer could check by watching. music[] is empty because no music detector ran, NOT because the clip is known to be clean. silence[] is derived from VAD segment boundaries (gaps ≥ 0.6s), not from an energy floor.

note: A run that actually happened on 2026-07-13, against real CC-BY media. Source lines are gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize; the confidence the gates read is cross-recogniser agreement with whisper-1, because gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize returns no logprobs and a confidence we cannot measure is one we do not print.
